description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a streamlined, tactical design, featuring a predominantly green body and a black barrel. The stock is robust and angular, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the fore-end is elongated and vented for heat dissipation. The receiver area includes a visible trigger guard and a magazine well, suggesting a detachable box magazine. The barrel is relatively thick and of medium length, with no visible ribbing or venting along its top. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical for contemporary tactical shotguns. The finish is matte, reducing glare and enhancing grip.
description: A modern, green and black tactical shotgun with a solid stock, vented fore-end, and matte finish. It features a detachable magazine and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the slim profile of the fore-end.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the green body, black barrel, angular stock, and the magazine well beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Viewed from the butt end, the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel with the body are visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, highlighting the same features with slight differences in visible details on the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, medium length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
